page_metadata.biotools__summary: Visualisation tool for representing a set of glycan structures as a summary figure of all structural features using icons and colours recommended by the Consortium for Functional Glycomics (CFG).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Visualisation tool for representing a set of glycan structures as a summary figure of all structural features using icons and colours recommended by the Consortium for Functional Glycomics (CFG).
